name: ADC Modular TCS — CDU-to-rack header & branch lines
telemetry_domain: D3 (Tier 2 under the CDU; Oem/TCSInterface/* via the CDU bridge)

parameters.value: 46 ft row, 16 racks / 4 bays, one end-fed 2 MW / 500 GPM CDU
6 in Sch 10S 304L, 5.05 ft/s at 500 GPM (≤6 ft/s), Victaulic grooved
2 in / DN50 EPDM-lined SS-braided hose, avg 126 in drop, per-assembly hydro + helium certs + barcodes
ASTM A380/A967 passivation, hydro 1.3–1.5x WP, helium ≤1e-5 atm·cc/s on hoses, copper-sulfate verified, N2 purged, tamper-evident caps, OCP §17 barcodes; site flush ≤24 h vs 6–8 weeks stick-built

Joukowsky ≈326 psi at instantaneous DN50 closure > 150 psig WP — slow-close actuators (≥30 s 6-in butterflies, ≥5 s 2-in balls), accumulators, staged-sequencing MOPs, mandatory pre-commissioning surge analysis
SS304 drip tray + 3-zone leak rope (TraceTek/RLE) into the CDU PLC
hangers 8 ft o.c. (>2x B31.9 margin), V-pattern seismic bracing — LA-PE stamp required (SUP-01)
